name: AIIMS Rajkot – Senior Resident – 88 Posts
qualification: DNB, Master of Dental Surgery, MS/MD, M.Ch

basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Rajkot Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 88 Posts
basic_details.short_information: AIIMS Rajkot Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 88 vacancies across Gujarat. Candidates with DNB, Master of Dental Surgery, MS/MD, M.Ch Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 09-05-2026, and closes on 08-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through AIIMS Rajkot website, aiimsrajkot.edu.in.

qualification.education_qualification: DNB, Master of Dental Surgery, MS/MD, M.Ch

salary_details.pay_scale: Level-11 (7th CPC) + allowances including NPA for medical candidates

how_to_apply: Eligible candidates can apply online only through the link provided on AIIMS Rajkot website. A candidate can apply for a maximum of two departments (separate applications required).
seo_tags: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Rajkot Senior Resident Recruitment 2026
